reference: WITH THEM THE BODY HAS WORN OUT THE SOUL THE SENSES HAVE BURNED UP THE HEART DISSIPATION HAS BLUNTED THE FEELINGS
text: with them the body has worn out the soul the senses have burned up the heart dissipation has blunted the feelings the mind has gone to sleep the body has worn out the soul the senses have burned up the heart dissipation has blunted the feelings
